text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, have you seen this "Number" magazine?
It did a feature on Tracen's students.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Their paths to their dreams... as newly born lights,
racing toward the future. Just seeing them gets
me excited.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. If I made it in, you could read it one day,
far into the future, and reminisce about me,
couldn't you?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, but it wouldn't be just me. You'd remember
the others too, as well as all they saw, reflected in
their eyes. I know you would.
